content:
Your resume is well-organized, with a clear layout and relevant sections. Your objective statement could be more specific—it currently provides a general overview but should be tailored to the role you’re applying for. Your work experience section is solid, but it would be even stronger if you included quantifiable achievements—specific numbers or results will help demonstrate the impact of your work.

Overall, these are small refinements that will help elevate your materials even more. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 85/100
• Resume: 88/100

⸻

Letter for Aurelie Bollinger

Dear Aurelie,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. Your materials reflect a strong foundation, and I appreciate the effort you’ve put into them. Below is my feedback.

Your cover letter is well-written and professional. You do a great job of explaining your background and qualifications, but one area where you could improve is making the letter more tailored to the specific job and company. Right now, it provides a solid general overview, but adding more details about why this company is a great fit for you would make your application more compelling. Additionally, a stronger call to action in your closing paragraph—such as requesting an interview—would leave a lasting impression.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 13 (chunk 13/22)
